title: Frugl
subtitle: Price Comparison Platform
description: A real-time price comparison engine that aggregates deals across major retailers, helping users find the best prices instantly. The platform uses intelligent crawling and data normalization to present accurate, up-to-date pricing across thousands of products.

title: Grab Merchant Resource Center
subtitle: Merchant Platform · Grab
description: A comprehensive self-service platform for Grab's merchant partners across Southeast Asia. Designed to streamline onboarding, provide business analytics, and centralize resources for multi-market operations.

title: Grow with Google
subtitle: Digital Skills Initiative
description: An interactive learning platform for Google's digital skills initiative, delivering localized training modules to help individuals and businesses grow their digital capabilities across emerging markets.

title: Prudential Famvatar
subtitle: Family Insurance Experience
description: A gamified insurance experience that lets families create personalized avatars and explore coverage options together. The interactive journey transforms complex insurance products into an engaging, visual decision-making process.

title: Ad Ports ATLP
subtitle: Logistics & Trade Platform
description: A logistics and trade management platform for Abu Dhabi Ports, featuring AI-driven routing optimization, real-time cargo tracking, and comprehensive port operations dashboards for stakeholders across the supply chain.

title: Emirates NBD Service Portal
subtitle: Banking Service Portal
description: A unified service request platform for Emirates NBD that bridges branch and digital banking experiences. Streamlines customer service journeys with intelligent routing and comprehensive journey mapping.

title: Emirates NBD Wealth App
subtitle: Wealth Management App
description: A premium wealth management application designed for high-net-worth clients. Features sophisticated portfolio visualization, personalized investment advisory flows, and a refined experience tailored to the expectations of private banking customers.

title: Client Insights
subtitle: Analytics Dashboard
description: A predictive analytics dashboard that surfaces actionable client behavior insights. Combines engagement scoring with data-driven decision support to help teams prioritize outreach and optimize client relationships.

title: C3.ai
subtitle: Enterprise AI Platform
description: Enterprise AI application suite enabling organizations to deploy and manage machine learning operations at scale. Focused on building intuitive interfaces for predictive analytics that make complex AI capabilities accessible to business users.

title: Blacksmith KYC
subtitle: Identity Verification
description: An AI-powered identity verification platform that automates document verification, compliance workflows, and risk scoring. Reduces manual review time while maintaining regulatory compliance across multiple jurisdictions.

title: Line Live
subtitle: Live Streaming Platform
description: A live streaming platform for LINE's entertainment ecosystem, featuring real-time audience interaction tools, creator monetization systems, and an engaging viewing experience designed for mobile-first audiences across Asia.
